2148810.name: RuneScape Anniversary Celebration Pack
2148810.description:
We're celebrating two years of RuneScape on Steam! Claim your free Anniversary Celebration Pack for some handy game-boosting goodies.

The free Anniversary Celebration Pack features:

1 Small Knowledge Bomb
2 Large Celebration Lamps


Note
· The Anniversary Celebration Pack items are not tradeable or refundable.
· The Anniversary Celebration Pack is a one-time purchase and is not recurring. Recurring memberships can only be purchased via the in-game interface.
· The Small Knowledge Bomb and the 2 Large Celebration Lamps are delivered in an Anniversary Celebration Pack item box.
2148810.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
